checks.detail: Atomic approval flag is enabled or mode is plan.
checks.name: approval_enabled

checks.detail: Live trading flag is enabled or mode is plan.
checks.name: live_feature_flag

checks.detail: Kill switch is off for send mode or mode is plan.
checks.name: kill_switch_off_for_send

checks.name: manual_confirmation

checks.name: private_key_available

checks.name: private_key_matches_wallet

checks.detail: Atomic executor enabled flag is set.
checks.name: executor_enabled

checks.detail: Atomic executor review flag is set.
checks.name: executor_reviewed

checks.detail: Approval transaction is on Base or not yet prepared.
checks.name: chain_id_base

checks.detail: Approval is needed or mode is plan.
checks.name: approval_needed

notes: Atomic executor approval is a real Base transaction in approve mode.
It approves a capped USDC amount to the atomic executor, not to a router.
Approval does not start trading. Atomic route simulation must still pass before live autopilot can send arbitrage.
